chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 325 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 13.05.2026 Mr. Mohammad Abbas, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Adnan Moton, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel, under instructions, submits that the reference applicant may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
